articles.author: Konstantin Toropin
articles.title: US strike on an alleged drug boat kills 2, leaves 6 survivors, in the eastern Pacific Ocean - AP News
articles.description: The U.S. military has conduced another strike against a boat accused of smuggling drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean, immediately killing two people and leaving six survivors amid an ongoing campaign against alleged traffickers in Latin America. The latest at…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) The U.S. military has conduced another strike against a boat accused of smuggling drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean on Thursday, immediately killing two people and leaving six surviv… [+2822 chars]
